steps: The given list has 7 values already sorted: 12, 22, 24, 33, 39, 42, 44. With an odd count of 7, the median is the 4th value: \(\text{median} = 33\).
Each answer choice also has 7 values. After sorting each, the median is its 4th element.
Check the 4th element of each choice: A gives 38, B gives 39, C gives 33, D gives 28. Only C matches the target median of 33.

• A 22, 25, 35, 38, 49, 50, 54 — 4th element is 38 ≠ 33. Eliminated.
  • B 22, 28, 33, 39, 41, 43, 46 — 4th element is 39 ≠ 33. Eliminated.
  • C 12, 15, 28, 33, 35, 39, 39 — 4th element is 33 ✓. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D 22, 25, 26, 28, 33, 33, 39 — 4th element is 28 ≠ 33. Eliminated.
